title: Foam Kneeling Pad and Hand Trowel Shovel Outdoor Home Garden Combo Set
description:
This garden trowel is perfect for keeping your garden tidy! Comes with two foam kneeling pads for comfortable gardening. The hand trowel is made with tough plastic which makes it durable and lightweight. Each trowel features a 4 inch measuring scale on the scoop so you can control the depth of your digging. The foam pads feature soft cushioning for kneeling or sitting on hard surfaces with handles for easy transport and storage. Comes in Blue and Green (color ships at random)
